key_findings: 49.2% of chunks have section_type='' and are invisible to Section-Routed retrieval (DEC-015 finding). This is the empirical justification for retiring the DocumentAwareChunker.
Chunks per resume: mean=8.84, median=8.0, min=0, max=77, p95=21.
Largest role bucket: SalesManager with 1339 chunks.
recommendation: Retire DocumentAwareChunker as the active strategy. The 40%+ missing-section_type rate makes Section-Routed retrieval unreliable (DEC-019, DEC-015).
